title: Airtel Unveils Cutting-Edge Innovations and Sustainability Initiatives at Exclusive Media Roundtable - FinancialEDGE
description: Airtel Nigeria, as part of its continued efforts to foster stronger relationships with key stakeholders, hosted a Media Roundtable event to discuss updates on its sustainability initiatives, innovations, and strategic approach towards ensuring seamless customer experience. The event which held on Tuesday, September 24, 2024, at Sheraton Hotel Ikeja, had over 30 senior media personnel
html: Airtel Nigeria, as part of its continued efforts to foster stronger relationships with key stakeholders, hosted a Media Roundtable event to discuss updates on its sustainability initiatives, innovations, and strategic approach towards ensuring seamless customer experience.
